fields.name: Copy_1_of_ErrorMissedDeadlineReason
fields.fieldText:
Error - Record Not Saved


If Actual Date is later than Projected Date, fill Delay and Delay Comment fields.

value.stringValue: pro_Projected_Date__c:true, pro_Actual_Date__c:true, pro_Primary_Delay__c:true, pro_Secondary_Delay__c:true, pro_Additional_Delay__c:true, pro_Delay_Comment__c:true

fields.name: DealSyncErrorDisplay
fields.fieldText:
Error updating the Sync Documentation field on the associated Deal:


{!$Flow.FaultMessage}

fields.name: SynedEventUpdateErrorDisplay
fields.fieldText:
Error updating synchronized Documentation Events:


{!$Flow.FaultMessage}
